zh.Sterborough Castle, Lingfield, Surrey, E: 英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Cobham於1350年出生在英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素時，她的父親Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham50歲，母親Joane de Berkeley25歲。她於1371年之前與Henry de Grey在英國素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年在她的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國艾可可利沙拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Cobham于1350年出生在英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素时，她的父亲Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham50岁，母亲Joane de Berkeley25岁。她于1371年之前与Henry de Grey在英国素瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年在她的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国艾可可利沙拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Cobham was born in 1350, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, her father, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, was 50 and her mother, Joane de Berkeley, was 25. She married Henry de Grey before 1371, in Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1396, in her hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Chrishall, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Cobham est née en 1350, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Joane de Berkeley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Grey avant 1371, à Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Chrishall, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Cobham 1350 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham 50 und ihre Mutter Joane de Berkeley 25. Sie hat vor 1371 in Surrey, England Henry de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1396 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Chrishall, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Cobham è nata il nel 1350 nel Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, sua padre, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Joane de Berkeley, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Grey prima del 1371, nel Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Chrishall, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Cobhamが1350年にイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobhamは50歳，母Joane de Berkeleyは25歳であった。1371年以前にイギリススリーでHenry de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスチリシャルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Cobham(이)가 1350년 영국 수리 스터버루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Berkeley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1371년 이전 영국 수리에서 Henry de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 크리샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: Gloucester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Cobham nasceu em 1350, em Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Berkeley, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Grey antes 1371, em Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Chrishall, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Cobham родилась в 1350 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Berkeley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Grey перед 1371 г. в местности сурри, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1396 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности кришолл, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Cobham nació en 1350, en Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Joane de Berkeley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Henry de Grey antes de 1371, en Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Chrishall, Essex, Inglaterra.
